'''nonafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twatfaced|twatfaced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twatfaced|twatfaced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nonafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nonafithi|nonafithi]] || [[word:nonafiji|nonafiji]] || [[word:nonafishi|nonafishi]] || [[word:nonafiki|nonafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nonafuthuthu|nonafuthuthu]] || [[word:nonafujuju|nonafujuju]] || [[word:nonafushushu|nonafushushu]] || [[word:nonafukuku|nonafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nonafuthu|nonafuthu]] || [[word:nonafuju|nonafuju]] || [[word:nonafushu|nonafushu]] || [[word:nonafuku|nonafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nonafufthuf|nonafufthuf]] || [[word:nonafufjuf|nonafufjuf]] || [[word:nonafufshuf|nonafufshuf]] || [[word:nonafufkuf|nonafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nonafethe|nonafethe]] || [[word:nonafeje|nonafeje]] || [[word:nonafeshe|nonafeshe]] || [[word:nonafeke|nonafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nonafothotho|nonafothotho]] || [[word:nonafojojo|nonafojojo]] || [[word:nonafoshosho|nonafoshosho]] || [[word:nonafokoko|nonafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nonafotho|nonafotho]] || [[word:nonafojo|nonafojo]] || [[word:nonafosho|nonafosho]] || [[word:nonafoko|nonafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nonafofthof|nonafofthof]] || [[word:nonafofjof|nonafofjof]] || [[word:nonafofshof|nonafofshof]] || [[word:nonafofkof|nonafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfthÃŸf|nonafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfjÃŸf|nonafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfshÃŸf|nonafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfkÃŸf|nonafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nonafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nonafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nonafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nonafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfthÃŸf|nonafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfjÃŸf|nonafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfshÃŸf|nonafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfkÃŸf|nonafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfthÃŸf|nonafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfjÃŸf|nonafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfshÃŸf|nonafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nonafÃŸfkÃŸf|nonafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nonafÃḊthÃḊ|nonafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nonafÃḊjÃḊ|nonafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nonafÃḊshÃḊ|nonafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nonafÃḊkÃḊ|nonafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nonafathatha|nonafathatha]] || [[word:nonafajaja|nonafajaja]] || [[word:nonafashasha|nonafashasha]] || [[word:nonafakaka|nonafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nonafatha|nonafatha]] || [[word:nonafaja|nonafaja]] || [[word:nonafasha|nonafasha]] || [[word:nonafaka|nonafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nonafafthaf|nonafafthaf]] || [[word:nonafafjaf|nonafafjaf]] || [[word:nonafafshaf|nonafafshaf]] || [[word:nonafafkaf|nonafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nonafasha|nonafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nonafshÃḋsha|nonafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nonafrosha|nonafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nonafmusha|nonafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nonafyasha|nonafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gononafnkshÃḋsha|gononafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gononafnkrosha|gononafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gononafnkmusha|gononafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gononafnkyasha|gononafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nonanafasha|nonanafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nonanafshÃḋsha|nonanafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nonanafrosha|nonanafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nonanafmusha|nonanafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nonanafyasha|nonanafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gononanafnkshÃḋsha|gononanafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gononanafnkrosha|gononanafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gononanafnkmusha|gononanafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gononanafnkyasha|gononanafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nenÃḊfasha|nenÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nenÃḊfshÃḋsha|nenÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nenÃḊfrosha|nenÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nenÃḊfmusha|nenÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nenÃḊfyasha|nenÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonenÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gonenÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonenÃḊfnkrosha|gonenÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonenÃḊfnkmusha|gonenÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonenÃḊfnkyasha|gonenÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nonfafasha|nonfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nonfafshÃḋsha|nonfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nonfafrosha|nonfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nonfafmusha|nonfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nonfafyasha|nonfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gononfafnkshÃḋsha|gononfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gononfafnkrosha|gononfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gononfafnkmusha|gononfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gononfafnkyasha|gononfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
